name: ar10dev.github.io
postCreateCommand:
bash -lc 'set -e; export BUN_INSTALL="$HOME/.bun"; curl -fsSL https://bun.sh/install | bash; "$BUN_INSTALL/bin/bun" --version; "$BUN_INSTALL/bin/bun" install; grep -q "BUN_INSTALL="$HOME/.bun"" ~/.bashrc || printf "
export BUN_INSTALL="$HOME/.bun"
export PATH="$BUN_INSTALL/bin:$PATH"
" >> ~/.bashrc; grep -q "BUN_INSTALL="$HOME/.bun"" ~/.zshrc || printf "
export BUN_INSTALL="$HOME/.bun"
export PATH="$BUN_INSTALL/bin:$PATH"
" >> ~/.zshrc'
